scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
scripts.type-check: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run type-check --workspace=client && npm run type-check --workspace=server && npm run type-check --workspace=shared
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=client && npm run test --workspace=server
